skill1.note: Cadence of those 120 normals rides the unverified AR datamine cadence tuple (⚑); shield proc rate scales with it (caveat 3).

skill1.kitLine: Creates a shared Shield equal to 11.8% of the skill user's final Max HP that protects all allies from damage. Lasts for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Event-only shield (fires `shielded` triggers for naga-type consumers). No HP pool / damage absorption in v1, so the 11.8% basis is defensive-only; value 11.8 = lvl10.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after Full Burst ends. Affects all allies. Constantly recovers 3.68% of the skill user's final Max HP every 1 sec for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Per-second tick cadence modeled (5 events) so on-recovery consumers stay refreshed (caveat 1). The 3.68%-of-MaxHP magnitude is NOT encoded — inert, no HP pool; only the recovery-event cadence matters.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends with an ally from the same squad still on the battlefield. Affects self. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 40.76 sec.
skill2.note: 'Ally still on battlefield' condition modeled UNCONDITIONAL — always true on the partless boss (nobody dies). Collapses 60s CD to ~19.2s residual = the kit's engine for debuff/heal uptime.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Constantly recovers 3.84% of the skill user's final Max HP every 1 sec for 8 sec.
burst.note: 8 per-second recovery events modeled (caveat 1). 3.84% magnitude inert (no HP pool); only event cadence is load-bearing for recovery consumers.

burst.kitLine: Affects 1 ally unit(s) with the lowest remaining HP (except the skill user). Gain Indomitability for 10 sec.
burst.note: Genuinely-skippable survival (revive/death-immunity class). Boss lethality unmodeled in v1, so death-immunity has no consumer. Targeting line shared with the Max HP block below.

burst.kitLine: Affects 1 ally unit(s) with the lowest remaining HP (except the skill user). Max HP ▲ 31.68% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[2] trigger:burstCast target:alliesLowestHp {count:1, excludeSelf:true} → buff {stat:targetMaxHpPct, value:31.68, durationSec:10}
burst.note: Modeled for kit-SSOT completeness (caveat 2, theme-13). Offensively INERT: lands on a teammate (casterIdx≠self) so it does NOT feed their atkOfMaxHpPct conversion (e3 rule). v1 has no HP pool, so 'lowest remaining HP' resolves to the leftmost non-self ally as a deterministic stand-in. No board damage moves.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Damage Taken ▲ 39.26% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] trigger:burstCast target:enemy → buff {stat:damageTakenPct, value:39.26, durationSec:10}
burst.note: Her ONLY direct offensive line vs a partless boss. Value 39.26 = lvl10. High uptime thanks to the S2 burst-CDR engine.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; unit is tier MODEL_ONLY, tuned=false, never fielded (graded.teams=0).
documentedConfounds.why: Umbrella status: no number on this unit has been confirmed against a real fight. Direction of any future gap is unknown a priori; this is the dominant uncertainty, not a specific HOT/COLD lever.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑(1) CADENCE TUPLE: pullsPerSec at AR class default / reloadFrames 81 / rolling-reload — unmeasured, NOT escalated (60-ammo AR at class rate doesn't empty <1s; no revolver/per-N-round/charge flavor).
documentedConfounds.why: Affects her own (small, Defender-class) normal DPS and the S1 shield proc rate. Note judges it low-impact and unescalated; no per-shot flavor that a wrong rate would distort. Verify rounds/min + reload gap from any Blanc focus video.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: shield cadence (every 120 normal attacks) scales with the unverified datamine cadence tuple (⚑).
documentedConfounds.why: Shield is event-only and defensive; only matters if a shield-gated consumer (naga-type 'when a Shield is set') is in the comp. Inert for board damage in consumer-less teams; a wrong cadence would mis-time `shielded` procs only.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2/burst: heals now emit real per-second ticks (ticks:5 S2 / ticks:8 burst) — on-recovery consumers (Crown-type) stay refreshed across each window (engine gap #1 fix, 2026-07-17).
documentedConfounds.why: Documented FIX, not an open gap. Inert in a team with no recovery-consumer; the prior under-count (1 event/activation) is resolved. Residual ⚑(2): exact tick-refresh semantics still unmeasured in a live consumer team — verify consumer buff uptime across an FB cycle if such a comp is graded.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Max HP ▲31.68% on lowest-remaining-HP ally modeled via targetMaxHpPct (own-% basis) + alliesLowestHp; offensively INERT, leftmost non-self ally is the deterministic stand-in (no HP pool).
documentedConfounds.why: Explicitly kit-SSOT completeness only — no board damage moves. Would become offensive ONLY if it lands on an HP-scaling (atkOfMaxHpPct) teammate AND the e3 casterIdx≠self rule were revisited; guardrail caveat, revisit if such a comp is graded.

documentedConfounds.text: HP-SCALING DETERMINATION: NOT an HP-scaling kit — every Max-HP reference is a defensive/heal BASIS (shield 11.8%, heals 3.68%/3.84%, burst Max HP ▲31.68% survival buff), never an HP→ATK conversion. No atkOfMaxHpPct/casterMaxHpPct scaler modeled.
documentedConfounds.why: A settled determination (confirms 2026-07-16 baseline), not an open gap. Rules OUT a class of missing scaler; if wrong it would be a HOT surprise, but the prose supports it (no conversion language anywhere in the kit).

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Blanc as a Wind AR Defender/enabler whose ONLY direct offensive line vs a partless boss is her burst's Damage Taken ▲39.26% debuff (damageTakenPct on burstCast, 10s). The S2 burst-CDR (▼40.76s on fullBurstEnd, 'ally alive' condition treated as unconditional since nobody dies on the partless boss) collapses her 60s CD to ~19.2s and is the engine for high debuff/heal uptime. S1 shield and S2/burst heals are event-only blocks that exist to fire teammate `shielded`/`recovery` triggers (naga-/Crown-type); heal magnitudes are deliberately not encoded because v1 has no HP pool. Known-not-faithful spots: Indomitability skipped as inert survival, the burst Max HP ▲31.68% buff is a kit-SSOT-only placeholder (offensively inert, leftmost-ally stand-in for lowest-remaining-HP), and the entire unit is an unmeasured MODEL_ONLY parser baseline carrying an unverified AR cadence tuple ⚑. No kit line is silently dropped (zero MISSING).
